projects.title: Senior Trike Project
projects.description: Race-winning senior capstone tricycle engineered end-to-end: CAD, FEA, steel-frame fabrication, TIG welding, machining, drivetrain optimization, DFM/DFA improvements, and final competition validation.

projects.title: Mechatronics Sensor Payload
projects.description: Autonomous multi-sensor drone payload with IMU, ultrasonic, water, and thermal sensing; servo actuation; embedded C++/Arduino firmware; telemetry; safe states; and field-test validation.

projects.title: Autonomous Rescue Robot
projects.description: Autonomous ground robot with Python control logic, ultrasonic and IR/magnetic sensing, PID-tuned drive behavior, telescoping actuator, solenoid hook, and reliability improvements after live testing.

projects.title: Portfolio Website & Design System
projects.description: Responsive portfolio and project microsite system built with accessible, mobile-first HTML/CSS/JS, JSON-driven content, SEO metadata, and progressive enhancement.
